title: Unblinking
description: Be careful when blinking, you might have a destructive view!
body:
Challenge required? What about this: The block you're facing is being destroyed every 4 seconds! 

With _Unblinking_, you have a dangerous view. You have to be quick when crafting, mining or just being idle because the blocks won't exist long.

This mod has already been tested and was found very funny but challenging.

Try it out, but be careful!
